title: cryptandra polyclada subsp. polyclada
intro: Cryptandra polyclada subsp. polyclada is a plant species in the family Epacridaceae, native to Australia, and is also known as the 'blackcurrant bush'. The medicinal properties of this plant are due to its high content of flavonoids, which have been traditionally used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits associated with the use of Cryptandra polyclada subsp. polyclada include its antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties, which may help to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and support immune function. Herbal preparations of this plant can be used as a tea or tincture, and it is also used in traditional medicine in Australia, although its efficacy and safety for human use have not been extensively scientifically studied.
